message:
test: expand framework seam guard to cover both core and CLI crates, fix mux reliability harness

framework_seam_guard.rs:
- Expand guard coverage from frankenterm-core/src/ only to both
  frankenterm-core (src/, tests/, benches/) and frankenterm CLI
  (src/, tests/, benches/) crate surfaces
- Switch from filename-based allowlist to absolute-path allowlist so
  the guard correctly identifies seam modules by full path
- Add collect_surface_files() helper to scan multiple surface dirs
- Sort collected files for deterministic test output
- Allow the guard test file itself in the allowlist (it necessarily
  imports the patterns it checks for)

native_mux_reliability_harness.rs:
- Fix command_request_carries_policy_trace_to_router test to use
  CommandScope::pane() constructor instead of CommandScope::Pane()
  (API changed to method-based construction)
- Remove unused mutable registry setup and redundant
  router.register_target() calls that were leftover from an earlier
  router API that required explicit target registration
- Add audit_log non-empty assertion to verify the routed command
  appears in the audit trail

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
